docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOUIE PETER TIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG PETER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00, ALSO THERE WILL BE 7% PER ANNUM INTEREST TO BE PAID IN BALLOON PYMT AFTER MONTHLY PAYMENTS ON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LOUIE PETER TIN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG PETER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG PETER
